initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    p.player_name,
    SUM(CASE WHEN mp.team_result = 'win' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS win_count,
    SUM(CASE WHEN mp.team_result = 'loss' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS loss_count
FROM players p
JOIN match_participants mp ON p.player_id = mp.player_id
JOIN matches m ON mp.match_id = m.match_id
WHERE mp.player_id IS NOT NULL
  AND mp.team_result != 'draw'
GROUP BY p.player_id, p.player_name
ORDER BY win_count DESC, loss_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    p.player_name,
    SUM(CASE WHEN mp.team_result = 'win' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS win_count,
    SUM(CASE WHEN mp.team_result = 'loss' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS loss_count
FROM players p
JOIN match_participants mp ON p.player_id = mp.player_id
WHERE mp.player_id IS NOT NULL
  AND mp.team_result IN ('win', 'loss')
GROUP BY p.player_id, p.player_name
ORDER BY win_count DESC, loss_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    p.player_name,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN mp.team_result = 'win' THEN 1 END) AS win_count,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN mp.team_result = 'lose' THEN 1 END) AS loss_count
FROM players p
JOIN match_participants mp ON p.player_id = mp.player_id
JOIN matches m ON mp.match_id = m.match_id
WHERE mp.player_id IS NOT NULL 
  AND mp.team_result != 'draw'
GROUP BY p.player_id, p.player_name
ORDER BY win_count DESC, loss_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    p.player_name,
    SUM(CASE WHEN mp.team_result = 'win' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS win_count,
    SUM(CASE WHEN mp.team_result = 'loss' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS loss_count
FROM players p
JOIN match_participants mp ON p.player_id = mp.player_id
JOIN matches m ON mp.match_id = m.match_id
WHERE mp.player_id IS NOT NULL
  AND mp.team_result != 'draw'
GROUP BY p.player_id, p.player_name
ORDER BY win_count DESC, loss_count DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT player_name
FROM (
    SELECT p.player_name,
           SUM(CASE WHEN mp.team_result = 'win' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS win_count,
           SUM(CASE WHEN mp.team_result = 'loss' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS loss_count
    FROM players p
    JOIN match_participants mp ON p.player_id = mp.player_id
    WHERE mp.player_id IS NOT NULL
      AND mp.team_result != 'draw'
    GROUP BY p.player_id, p.player_name
)
ORDER BY win_count DESC, loss_count DESC
LIMIT 1;
